did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a narrative review that synthesizes evidence from other studies regarding AI models for estimating Breslow thickness. It does not present original experimental results obtained by using AI, but rather discusses existing literature on deep learning models (e.g., CNNs, Vision Transformers) and their performance in dermatology.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
